chapters.title: Workplace Communication
chapters.objective: Develop confident speaking in meetings, updates, and collaboration.

lessons.title: Give A Project Update
lessons.goal: Explain project progress, blockers, and next steps clearly.

exercises.prompt: Model a concise status update with progress, blocker, and next step.
Run a manager-team-member roleplay where the learner gives a project update.

success_criteria: Learner can explain current progress in a structured way.
Learner can state one blocker and one next action clearly.

review_rule.trigger: Review if the learner gives updates without structure or misses transition language.

chapters.title: Opinions And Arguments
chapters.objective: Strengthen spoken reasoning, nuance, and disagreement management.

lessons.title: Defend An Opinion Politely
lessons.goal: Express a clear opinion with reasons and respectful disagreement.

exercises.prompt: Ask the learner to discuss remote work and defend their view.

success_criteria: Learner gives an opinion plus at least two reasons.
Learner uses one respectful disagreement phrase.

review_rule.trigger: Review if reasons are underdeveloped or contrast markers are missing.
